title: Setrion's Fabulous Furniture
description: This mod adds tons of new Furniture to the game!
body:
![Setrion's Fabulous Furniture (Header)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5441be73edc6f3ca8f365a0082fe9474524cd62f.png)

Have you ever thought the game could use more Furniture? Well, with this Mod it surely has! Tons of it!

This Mod adds more than 10000! new Blocks to the the Game, with even more to come in the Future!

The Carpentry Table is crafted like this:

![Carpentry Table Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce0b22c90ec2aefd3966760db6e5ee4ba26bbd45.png) ### [Click here!](https://discord.com/invite/YtdPKMVnqj) to join the Discord Server! ## Example Furniture **Kitchen** ![Kitchen Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aab81c57788624b917306ef8e55a38292fe87614.png) **Bedroom** ![Bedroom Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Rma3TxeZ/images/43cb301a76bcfb64e9094e970e97a7fa624a77ab.png) **Outdoor** ![Outdoor Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Rma3TxeZ/images/d70bc56ea0e6a3dbee310ac8bbdc26442c6818cb.png) More furniture is going to be added in the future!
